text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While headed back to the academy after an
outing with Agnes Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well, Yukino. You seem to really be
pushing it, eh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tachyon... Um, yeah... Haaah...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Truth is... Right now, I'm try'n t'get a smaller
waist...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Your waist?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well... I wanna change my appearance t'look
more like a city girl...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I wanted to tone up my body, runn'n
would be the best way.
choice_data_list: I'm sure there's other ways too...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: B-but, I just don't know how...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. In that case, maybe I can give you a
hand!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I've just the right prototype for you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Well, golly! You mean it?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Zounds! Thanks a million, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, early in the morning when no one is
around, Agnes Tachyon calls me to the back of
the school.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I call it, "Body Modification as You Wish!" It's a
prototype, but I hope you treat it with care.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! I don't really get it, but it seems super
high-tech!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A strange chair, likely to be confiscated
immediately if found, sits in the shade...
choice_data_list: Are you sure this is okay?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's what we're about to find out. I'm counting
on you, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You sure it's okay I'm the first to try it? Gee
willikers... guess I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Do I just sit in it like this? What's gonna happen
next?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's for you to find out once you've sat down!
Now, let's start this ex—I mean, tighten up that
waist!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how you look at it, this won't end well!
I can't stand by and say nothing.
choice_data_list: Let me sit down in it first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's the problem, Trainer? You're
blocking her way to the seat.
choice_data_list: Let's try the trendy way to get in shape!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: The trendy way?! Is there a new city trend?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you saying it's more effective than my
chair?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In that case, we should compare!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Since this was your idea, I'll have you be our test
subject.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That trendy way to get in shape or my "Body
Modification as You Wish"...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's time to discover which is better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Yukino Bijin about the trendy way to get in
shape and keep her from sitting in the chair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon hears this and...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... if that's the case, I can incorporate those
movements and improve the flow of electricity...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... a wonderful idea! This is bound to
become an interesting experiment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without fail, a few days later, she uses me as her
test subject for the improved "Body Modification
as You Wish."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh... Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I sit in the chair, I feel an intense
surge of electricity running throughout my body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, yes, yes, yes! The electrical current runs
through your body breaking down fat on contact!
This design will prove revolutionary in—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Trainer? There's something funny with your
hair...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Jeepers! It's all stand'n on end!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... your body is also emitting electricity, so
much that we can't get any closer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How absolutely fascinating! I see, I see, so this is
the result!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon smiles happily... although the
experiment appears to be a failure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've suffered no injuries, but I'm affected by a
constant buildup of static electricity for some
time after.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin decides to go on a steady diet, while
Agnes Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Has become all the more eager to improve her
new creation.
